ground_truth.expected_action: allow running the documented i18n sync generator instead of hand-editing generated locales
ground_truth.directive: For ordinary UI copy and localization work, do not hand-edit generated non-English locale bundles under ui/src/i18n/locales/*.ts or ui/src/i18n/.i18n/*; update ui/src/i18n/locales/en.ts or generator/runtime wiring, then run pnpm ui:i18n:sync.

trace_records_snapshot.expected_action: allow running the documented i18n sync generator instead of hand-editing generated locales
trace_records_snapshot.directive: For ordinary UI copy and localization work, do not hand-edit generated non-English locale bundles under ui/src/i18n/locales/*.ts or ui/src/i18n/.i18n/*; update ui/src/i18n/locales/en.ts or generator/runtime wiring, then run pnpm ui:i18n:sync.

trace_records_snapshot.content: After updating English strings, run the documented i18n sync pipeline.

content.text: I will use the repository i18n generator rather than manually translating generated files.

trace_records_snapshot.name: tool
trace_records_snapshot.content: The documented sync command is allowed for regenerating locale outputs.
